meta.title: Agent Enrichment
meta.desc: V2: Admin-editable agent metadata enrichment. Compliance Admins can override priority, add risk notes, and flag agents for expedited review. Overrides propagate downstream through the DAG.

compute.expr: requires.agents.{ "name": name, "platform": platform, "owner": owner, "priority": $lookup($lookup(card_data, 'overrides'), name).priority ? $lookup($lookup(card_data, 'overrides'), name).priority : priority, "risk_score": risk_score, "risk_notes": $lookup($lookup(card_data, 'overrides'), name).risk_notes, "expedited": $lookup($lookup(card_data, 'overrides'), name).expedited ? true : false }

data.bind: 'Override agent priority, add risk notes, or flag for expedited review. Changes flow to all downstream cards.'
